zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Richard Whiting於1405年出生在英國英格蘭奧可福爾時，他的父親Thomas Whitton21歲，母親Katerine De Whyton16歲。他於1427年與Lady Mary Harman在英國英格蘭奧可福爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1457年在英國奧可福爾享年52歲，埋葬在英國奧可福爾。

nameMeanings.name: Whiting
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Whiting (Old English Hwīting, a patronymic from the personal name Hwīta, from hwīt ‘white’ applied as a nickname).
History: Rev. Samuel Whiting arrived in Boston, MA, in May 1636, and made his home in Lynn, MA.

variants.name: Witting
meanings: North German: habitational name from a place called Wittingen, near Braunschweig.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Richard Whiting was born in 1405, in Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas Whitton, was 21 and his mother, Katerine De Whyton, was 16. He married Lady Mary Harman in 1427, in Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died in 1457, in Oxfordshire, England, at the age of 52, and was buried in Oxfordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Richard Whiting est né en 1405, à Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Whitton, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Katerine De Whyton, avait 16 ans. Il a épousé Lady Mary Harman en 1427, à Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé en 1457, à Oxfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 52 ans, et a été enterré à Oxfordshire, Angleterre.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Whitingが1405年にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアで生まれた時，父Thomas Whittonは21歳，母Katerine De Whytonは16歳であった。1427年にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアでLady Mary Harmanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1457年にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアで52歳で死去し，イギリスオクスフォードシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Whiting(이)가 1405년 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Whitton(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Katerine De Whyton(은)는 16세였다. 그는 1427년 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르에서 Lady Mary Harman(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1457년 영국 스퍼드실르에서 52세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스퍼드실르에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Richard Whiting родился в 1405 г. в местности оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Thomas Whitton было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Katerine De Whyton, 16. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Mary Harman в 1427 г. в местности оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер в 1457 г. в местности оксфордшир, Англия в возрасте 52 лет и был похоронен в местности оксфордшир, Англия.
